user_message: I need you to process this email thread from Woodgrove Labs. I think there's an opportunity here but need to validate.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: territory planning Discussion - Woodgrove Labs
Date: 2024-01-16
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Robert Petrov (Woodgrove Labs), David Chen (Microsoft), Priya (Woodgrove Labs)

[00:02:00] Robert Petrov (Woodgrove Labs): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on territory planning from our last session.

[00:05:00] Robert Petrov (Woodgrove Labs): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:07:00] Robert Petrov (Woodgrove Labs): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is cost optimization.

[00:11:00] Priya (Woodgrove Labs): Let me add some context -- we've been working on stakeholder alignment and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:14:00] Robert Petrov (Woodgrove Labs): Let me add some context -- we've been working on vendor dependencies and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:17:00] David Chen (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:19:00] Priya (Woodgrove Labs): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:22:00] David Chen (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:27:00] David Chen (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is budget approval.
